name: @reactionview/source
description: ReActionView Rails template handler with Herb integration

scripts.build: cd javascript/packages/dev-tools && npm run build && cd ../../../ && npm run build:client
scripts.build:client: cd ../javascript/packages/client && npx rollup -c && cp dist/herb-client.umd.js ../../../reactionview/app/assets/javascripts/herb-client.umd.js && cp dist/herb-client.umd.js.map ../../../reactionview/app/assets/javascripts/herb-client.umd.js.map
